name: Specs Graph View
summary: Interactive flow graph visualization of spec nodes with hierarchical layout
goals: Render spec nodes as an interactive flow graph with hierarchical layout
Support zooming, panning, and node selection

specDetail.description: A SpecsGraph component built on FlowGraph and GraphNodes that renders spec nodes as an interactive directed graph. Nodes represent spec items with edges showing parent-child and dependency relationships. Supports zoom, pan, click-to-select, and drag-to-reposition.

parameters.name: nodes
parameters.description: Array of spec nodes to render in the graph

parameters.name: selectedNodeId
parameters.description: Currently selected node ID for highlighting

parameters.name: onNodeSelect
parameters.description: Callback when a node is clicked

constraints: Must render graphs with up to 500 nodes smoothly (60fps interactions)
Must use hierarchical layout as default with parent nodes above children
Must show node status with color coding (in-progress=blue, complete=green, draft=grey)

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project has spec nodes with parent-child relationships
acceptanceCriteria.when: the specs graph view is loaded
acceptanceCriteria.then: an interactive graph is rendered with hierarchical layout and clickable nodes

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
